title: Chapter 4
content:
Chapter 4: Female Knights Definitely Have Weak Assholes!

The best way to describe it is "clinging."

The folds of the female knight’s rectum clung stickily to my glans and shaft. As the thickest part of my corona advanced through her rectum, the viscous meat walls immediately filled the tiny gap that formed between my shaft and her insides, creating a soft, trailing stimulation. On top of that, her anal sphincter tried to squeeze and hold my shaft back, but the base of my thighs was pressed firmly against her soft ass. I was buried all the way to the root.

"Nngh... Aaaahhn...!"

"Ugh!"

My short, climaxing gasp mixed with the female knight’s defenseless moans.

With just a single thrust, I came. I ejaculated so much that even I could tell it was far more than usual.

"Ugh... It won’t stop...!"

Like a hose with the faucet fully open, my cock pulsed and pumped out massive amounts of semen.

Uwooooh. I’m a human orc!

My hips started shaking violently, making the half-crouching position painful, so I leaned forward and clung to the female knight, laying my upper body on top of her.

I... lost... my virginity...

The virgin who died in his original world just had anal sex with a female knight in another world...!

My semen seemed to have filled her intestines. The internal pressure pushed my penis outward.

"Haaahn!"

When my cock slipped out, her rectal walls clung to it as if trying to hold me back. The pleasure shot from my glans through my entire body, and I couldn’t endure it — I let out a pathetic cry.

But no one probably heard that voice. Because with a vulgar psshhh sound, white liquid was gushing out of the female knight’s asshole like a fountain.

It seemed the rumor that female knights have weak assholes was true. She had climaxed from my single thrust as well. Her lower body went limp, and while losing to the anal fountain, she noisily sprayed golden water everywhere, spreading a lewd scent. Then the female knight collapsed at the base of the tree.

With semen dripping from her asshole and urine leaking from her urethra, the female knight stopped moving.

That’s right.

She only had 1 HP left...

Did my insertion actually drain her last remaining HP?

"H-hey, get a hold of yourself!"

No matter how much she herself had wished for it, it would feel terrible if she died from anal sex.

What should I do?

Was she at least happy because she felt good at the very end?

No, that can’t be it.

I can’t use recovery magic, and I don’t have any healing items.

I already drank all of Dragon God Lucia’s love juice...

What now...?

"That’s it! I have modern Japanese knowledge! There must be something I can do without relying on fantasy powers!"

Even the cold air brushing against my sensitive glans made my hips twitch with pleasure, but I endured it and turned the female knight onto her back.

Then I decided to perform CPR — specifically, chest compressions.

Looking at her again, the female knight had the build of a high-school girl.

Even a girl like this has to fight vicious monsters in this world...!

I grabbed her firm, bouncy breasts that kept their shape even while she was lying on her back, and massaged them while focusing on the tips.

Aah... This is the first time I’ve touched a girl’s breasts...

They’re clearly much firmer than the chest of that fat guy I jokingly touched before.

Different from the bounce of a soft volleyball too.

Her white dress is already in tatters and basically useless. Should I take it off and try tit-fucking her?

I might never get another chance to get a paizuri...

"...! N-no, that’s not right. What the hell am I thinking!? Don’t listen to your dick at a time like this! A person’s life is at stake! Don’t let her die!"

I fought against the commands of my crotch and pressed down on the female knight’s chest.

Placing both hands in the valley between her breasts, I put my upper body weight into it and pushed repeatedly.

I vaguely remembered hearing somewhere that chest compressions should match the rhythm of some anime song.

Which anime was it?

I think it was for kids...

Damn it. The only kids’ anime I know is Pretty Cure.

Fine, Pretty Cure it is!

"Oppai Pururun, Pretty Cure♪

Oppai Pururun, Pretty Cure♪"

I only half-remembered the lyrics, but it felt about right.

"Oh right! Not just chest compressions — artificial respiration too...!"

My eyes were drawn to the female knight’s wet lips.

My heart started pounding hard.

I had already done something close to rape by having anal sex with her, but I had never kissed a girl before.

This would be... my first kiss...!

I-I’m nervous. Is it okay to kiss someone I’m not in love with?

Sex without love is possible, but a kiss without love isn’t!

Even girls being threatened and forcibly violated sometimes refuse only the kiss.

Of course, that’s just knowledge from erotic manga, but I think there’s some truth to it.

A kiss is an act of true love on a completely different level from mere lust or sexual desire.

But...

This is life-saving.

It’s not a kiss. So I slowly brought my face closer, and just before our lips touched—

I got headbutted.

"Ouch!"

"Ouch!"

It seemed the female knight had tried to sit up and we collided.

"You bastard! What the hell did you do!?"

"S-sorry!"

Was trying to kiss her a bad idea after all? Or was the anal sex itself the problem, even if she had consented? There’s a theory that some people don’t even count anal as real sex, so maybe I can push through with that?

"No, that’s not what I mean. What did you do? I’m recovering!"

"Huh?"

"The damage I took in battle is gone!"

The female knight stood up bravely, like raising a flag on the battlefield.

However—

Her knees trembled violently, and she immediately dropped back down, sitting on the ground like a girl. Even though the battle damage had healed, the fatigue from the anal sex seemed to remain. Or rather, since I only thrust once, her asshole must have been extremely weak.

Yes. The theory that female knights have weak assholes was proven true.

One of the two major goals I had for this other world — verifying the "female knight weak asshole" theory — was already completed on the first day. At this rate, the other goal of turning a loli beastgirl into my sex slave might be surprisingly easy to achieve too.

"Ah... I can’t put any strength in my legs... But the wounds don’t hurt at all..."

The female knight checked her arms and body, looking at her wounds.

Her white dress was in tatters, but the cuts and swelling on her body had completely disappeared at some point.

She was checking all over her body and seemed to have trouble seeing her own armpits, so I sniffed them instead and confirmed there were no wounds.

"They’re beautiful. Not a single hair growing there. Ah, I mean — not a single wound."

There were a few drops of clear, jewel-like sweat in the smooth, hairless hollow of her armpit.

"Y-you idiot! Don’t look at weird places!"

I was about to lick the sweat, but she closed her armpit faster.

"Why did my wounds heal? What exactly did you do?"

"What did I do...? Life-saving measures?"

"Are you... perhaps a high-ranking recovery magician?"

I could clearly see her nipples poking against the thin white dress, so she really had recovered.

"I’m not a recovery magician, but..."

"Then... did you use a legendary item like ’Elixir’ or ’Blood of the Gods’? No, those are just fairy tales... I can’t believe they actually exist, but..."

"Blood of the Gods?"

"Do you know something about it?"

"Well, not exactly ’know,’ but..."

I vaguely remembered reading some trivia somewhere that semen and blood have almost the same components.

I hadn’t taken a bath since getting covered in Dragon God Lucia’s love juices. Could it be that the remaining components of Lucia’s love juice on my dick were absorbed through the female knight’s rectum and healed her wounds?

Or was this also the effect of my special ability "Sex Warrior"?

"I don’t know the reason, but you’re saved now, so can’t we just call it good?"

"That’s true, but... Sorry, may I use my Appraisal skill on your item?"

"My item?"

Before I could even ask what she meant, the female knight grabbed my erection over my clothes. My cock, which had started to go soft a few minutes after ejaculating, gained new strength from the soft touch of her fingers.

"Hyaaau!"

Caught completely off guard, I let out a voice.

Did she mistake my dick for an item?

No way — is this really happening like in erotic manga?!

"Appraisal...! There’s a protection on it so my skill can’t see everything, but... T-this is...!"

This is bad.

She’s going to find out I have an inexperienced, virgin cock!
